001package com.github.tommyettinger.tantrum.regexodus;
002
003import org.apache.fory.Fory;
004import org.apache.fory.config.Config;
005import org.apache.fory.context.ReadContext;
006import org.apache.fory.context.WriteContext;
007import org.apache.fory.serializer.Serializer;
008import regexodus.ds.CharBitSet;
009
010public class CharBitSetSerializer extends Serializer<CharBitSet> {
011    public CharBitSetSerializer(Fory fory) {
012        super(fory.getConfig(), CharBitSet.class, false);
013    }
014    public CharBitSetSerializer(Config fory) {
015        super(fory, CharBitSet.class, false);
016    }
017
018    @Override
019    public void write(final WriteContext fory, final CharBitSet data) {
020        final int[] bits = data.getRawBits();
021        fory.getBuffer().writeIntsWithSize(bits);
022    }
023
024    @Override
025    public CharBitSet read(ReadContext fory) {
026        final CharBitSet obs = new CharBitSet();
027        final int numElements = fory.getBuffer().readBinarySize() >>> 2;
028        int[] values = new int[numElements];
029        fory.getBuffer().readInts(values, 0, numElements);
030        obs.setRawBits(values);
031        return obs;
032    }
033}
